what: Create deterministic Playwright smoke tests validating full Project lifecycle across API and Web: first onboarding create, project switch, archive/restore, and invalid-path activation guard.

where.description: Add end-to-end scenarios for core project lifecycle behavior.
Add reusable test fixtures/setup for project state preconditions.
Document exact test preconditions and execution command for contributors.

acceptance.given: A clean app state with no project
acceptance.when: E2E suite runs onboarding create and project switch scenarios
acceptance.then: All targeted flows pass with stable selectors and no flaky retries.

acceptance.given: A project marked invalid path in prepared fixture
acceptance.when: E2E suite attempts to activate that project
acceptance.then: UI blocks activation and asserts explicit invalid-path feedback.

patterns.name: Behavior-first Testing
patterns.reference: tdd skill guidance: public behavior over implementation details

context: An integrated smoke suite prevents regressions when API and Web evolve independently across many small tickets.
technicalNotes: Write one failing e2e at a time and stabilize selectors before adding next scenario. Merge-safe: add e2e-only files and avoid touching production code unless test reveals real bug. Models: Codex gpt-5.3-codex (high), Claude Opus 4.6 (high).
